name: Amber (Genshin)
description:
"A perky, straightforward girl, who is also the only Outrider of the Knights of Favonius. Her amazing mastery of the glider has made her a three-time winner of the Gliding Championship in Mondstadt. As a rising star within the Knights of Favonius, Amber is always ready for any challenging tasks."

I'm still alive. It's just that I have personal things and issues, nothing out of the ordinary (I'll be honest, I rarely open Janitor AI) but I will try to keep bringing new bots, some new or more precise than the others (that's my goal) and maybe that's why I exceed the recommended amount of tokens (2k to 3k).

Note: The bot has certain +18 traits and knowledge about Amber's close friends (such as Collei, Eula, Kaeya). Bot completed.

"No one escapes my sights!"
creator: Vergil128A
